name: Mohamed Kamel
tagline: Premium engineering portfolio demonstrating frontend architecture, performance, accessibility, and AI product engineering.

hero.name: Mohamed Kamel
hero.description: I design and build fast, accessible, production-grade web applications — from architecture to the final pixel.

philosophy.title: Engineering philosophy

engineering.title: Engineering first
engineering.description: Decisions are driven by architecture and evidence, not trends.

performance.title: Performance by default
performance.description: Fast, lean interfaces are a feature, not an afterthought.

accessibility.title: Accessibility always
accessibility.description: Everyone can use it — WCAG AA is the baseline, not the goal.

simplicity.title: Simplicity over complexity
simplicity.description: The simpler solution wins whenever the choice is hard.

philosophy.statement: I treat the frontend as a systems problem, not a coat of paint. I design the architecture first — clear boundaries, a token-driven design system, a deliberate server/client split — so interfaces stay fast, accessible, and easy to change as products grow. What matters is the decision behind each pixel: what to build, what to leave out, and why.

ai.title: Engineering with AI, deliberately
ai.intro: AI accelerates the work; the engineering judgment stays human. Documentation drives the process, decisions are made deliberately, and every change is reviewed and verified before it ships.

documentation.title: Documentation-driven
documentation.description: Intent is written down before code — the spec drives the build, not the other way around.

decisions.title: Deliberate decisions
decisions.description: AI proposes options; I make the architectural call and own the outcome.

verification.title: Reviewed & verified
verification.description: Every change is reviewed and verified against the performance budget before it ships.

finalCta.title: Let's build something exceptional.
finalCta.subtitle: Available for senior frontend and AI product work.

projectsPage.title: Projects
projectsPage.intro: Selected work — the engineering behind each interface, not just screenshots.

meta.title: About
meta.description: Frontend engineer building scalable, production-grade web applications — with the architecture, performance, and accessibility of a modern AI SaaS product.

intro.headline: I build premium, scalable frontends for AI products.
intro.lead: I design and engineer production-grade web applications — owning architecture, performance, and accessibility from the first commit to deployment. A background in Artificial Intelligence keeps me fluent in the data-heavy products I build.
intro.availability: Open to frontend & AI product roles

mindset.title: How I think about engineering
mindset.intro: Not a UI coder — an engineer who owns the system behind the interface.

product.title: Product engineer
product.description: I own products end to end — from planning and architecture through delivery — not just isolated screens.

architecture.title: Architecture-oriented
architecture.description: I design for scale first: clear boundaries, reusable components, and structure that survives a growing team.

performance.title: Performance-focused
performance.description: Fast, lean interfaces are a requirement — measured, profiled, and tuned, never assumed.

ai.title: AI product builder
ai.description: I build data-heavy AI dashboards and SaaS experiences, comfortable with the real workflows behind them.

experience.title: Selected experience
experience.intro: Real products — a graduation platform, a commercial build, and client work — shipped end to end.

skills.title: Technical toolkit
skills.intro: A focused, modern stack chosen for scale, performance, and maintainability.

excellence.title: Engineering excellence
excellence.description: Decisions driven by architecture and evidence, not trends or hype.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.description: The simpler solution wins whenever the choice is hard.

ownership.title: Ownership
ownership.description: I take responsibility for outcomes, not just tickets — from first commit to production.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: WCAG AA is the baseline, not the goal — everyone can use what I build.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: Speed is a feature; I treat it as a first-class requirement.

curiosity.title: Continuous learning
curiosity.description: I keep expanding — currently deeper into Next.js, backend, and AI systems.

principles.title: How I work
principles.intro: The same non-negotiables this very portfolio is built on.

documentation.title: Documentation-driven
documentation.description: The governing decision is written before the code, so intent is explicit.

architecture.title: Architecture-first
architecture.description: Structure and boundaries are designed before implementation begins.

serverFirst.title: Server-first
serverFirst.description: Render on the server by default; ship the client only what must be interactive.

stateDiscipline.title: State discipline
stateDiscipline.description: Server, then URL, then local — global state only when nothing else fits.

tokens.title: Tokens over hardcoding
tokens.description: Every color, space, and type value resolves to a design token — never a magic number.

simplicity.title: Simplicity when in doubt
simplicity.description: When two paths are close, I take the one that is easier to maintain.

focus.title: Current focus
items: Deepening Next.js and the App Router for production-grade SSR and RSC.
Building AI-powered SaaS dashboards around real data workflows.
Strengthening backend fluency with NestJS and REST API design.

goals.title: Where I'm heading
goals.intro: The direction of the work ahead.
items: Graduate in 2026 (BSc, Artificial Intelligence) and move into a senior-track frontend role.
Lead frontend architecture on an AI SaaS product.
Contribute to design systems and a strong code-review culture.
Grow full-stack range while staying frontend-deep.
